The code is purely boilerplate.  \n- **Recommendation:** Reduce securityRisk to 0 or 0.1 for consistency, as there's no real security concern.  \n- **Justification for malware/obfuscated:** Correctly scored as 0.\n\n---\n\n**Report 4**  \n- **Summary:** Same as above, standard factory code with no malicious elements.  \n- **Scores:** malware=0, obfuscated=0, securityRisk=0.2  \n- **Assessment:** Similar to Report 3, the securityRisk score appears slightly high.
